title: Empathy: Presence
description: Structured conversion of the legacy presence slides.

sources.label: Ronald D. Siegel, The Mindfulness Solution

slides.title: Presence
slides.body: Steady, non-hurried attention to the client's unfolding experience.
bullets: Stay with emotion, silence, and uncertainty.
Let felt sense emerge before meaning-making.
Clients often borrow the therapist's steadiness.

slides.title: Before you intervene
slides.body: Presence is an active clinical stance, not passivity.
steps: Ground your own body: feet, breath, pace.
Track affect and micro-shifts before asking the next question.
Pause after key moments so meaning can land.
Invite embodiment: what do you notice inside?
Let silence work unless the client loses contact.
